overview.name: WebSocket Standard Text Variables
overview.description:
This scenario verifies standard WebSocket text execution using variables.
Test flow includes: 1. Create variables for websocket comments, messages and expected files. 2. Connect to standard WebSocket. 3. Send first text message using variable. 4. Receive first echoed response.
This scenario validates: - Variable injection into websocket comments - Variable injection into websocket text messages - Variable injection into expected file names - Variable reuse across send/receive steps - Stable standard websocket text flow

constant.value: Step 1-6. Execute standard websocket text flow using variables

var.comment: Create variable for first send comment
var.name: firstSendComment

constant.value: Step 3. Send first text message using variable

var.comment: Create variable for first receive comment
var.name: firstReceiveComment

var.comment: Create variable for first text message
var.name: firstMessage
